title: Fractured Vanilla
description: A 1.21.1 Fabric modpack with 300+ mods enhancing Minecraft. Enjoy stunning biomes, smooth animations, optimized performance, epic bosses, and QOL tweaks.
body:
# Fractured Vanilla

**Rediscover the Beauty in the Broken.**

**Fractured Vanilla** is my take on a reimagined Minecraft 1.21.1 experience built on Fabric. It keeps the heart of vanilla but reshapes it with a carefully picked mix of mods that make the world feel both familiar and completely new. Every sound, animation, and shadow works together to give off the feeling of a world once whole, now beautifully fractured — full of atmosphere, depth, and life.

It’s built for players who want immersion without losing what makes Minecraft, Minecraft. Fractured Vanilla enhances the game in every way while staying true to its roots.

## Key Features





- **Evolved World Generation**: Traverse breathtaking, reshaped landscapes powered by Terralith, William Wythers’ Overhauled Overworld, and YUNG’s Better Structures. Discover ruins, forgotten paths, and reimagined biomes that tell new stories within the old world.
  
- **Lifelike Visuals & Motion**: With Fresh Animations, Not Enough Animations, and shaders like Bliss or Complementary Reimagined, every movement and light beam feels grounded yet surreal — turning Minecraft’s simplicity into a living canvas. 
  
- **Optimized Performance**: Built on performance pillars like Sodium, Lithium, FerriteCore, Noisium, and Dynamic FPS, Fractured Vanilla runs smoothly even across vast render distances and complex worlds.
  
- **Refined Combat & Boss Encounters**: Face reworked titans through Stellarity, Withering Heights, and Bosses of Mass Destruction. Each fight feels like a natural escalation of vanilla’s progression — more challenging, but never out of place.
  
- **Quality of Life, Thoughtfully Integrated**: Streamline your journey with mods like Inventory Essentials, AppleSkin, Harvest with Ease, Carry On, and Clumps. Small, meaningful tweaks that make survival seamless.
  
- **Exploration Tools & Adventure Gear**: Find your way with Explorer’s Compass, Traveler’s Compass, and Beacon Waypoints — or roam light with Sacks and Ender backpack, built for wanderers who go too far.
  
- **Atmospheric Building & Decor**: Supplementaries, Handcrafted, Falling Leaves, and Sooty Chimneys add depth and warmth to every build — perfect for crafting sanctuaries amid a fractured world.
  
- **Immersive Sound Design**: With Sound Physics Remastered, Dynamic Surroundings, and Immersive Thunder, the world doesn’t just look alive — it sounds alive. Feel every echo in the caves, every gust across the plains.
  
- **Enhanced Vanilla Mechanics**: Small, logical additions like Craftable Trident, Saddles, and Nametags, paired with tweaks like Better Than Mending and Easy Anvils, refine core gameplay without losing its spirit.
  
## Why Fractured Vanilla?

_Fractured Vanilla_ is for players who want a world that feels real — not because it’s bigger, but because it’s deeper. It doesn’t abandon vanilla; it builds upon it. It takes the familiar and fractures it into something mysterious, atmospheric, and endlessly replayable. Whether exploring, building, or battling, every moment is designed to feel earned and alive.

Perfect for solo journeys, shared worlds, or creative exploration — Fractured Vanilla is your chance to see Minecraft again for the first time.

## Get Involved

This modpack began as a personal project for me and my friends — a way to rediscover Minecraft’s beauty together.
I plan to keep it evolving with updates, balance tweaks, and occasional new content.

Got feedback or issues? Reach out on Discord: 
```
@suspicious_looking_cat
```

## Recommended Settings




**RAM:**  
Allocating 8GB should be fine for normal gameplay.
Avoid allocating more than 75% of your total system memory.


**SHADERS:**  
**Bliss Shader** best fits the tone and color palette of Fractured Vanilla.
I have made different presets for different configurations.


**DISTANT HORIZONS:**  
Enable Distant Horizons for extended render distances and true scale exploration.
It’s demanding — tune your settings carefully to your system’s capabilities.


## !!!IMPORTANT!!!
**run '/limitless maxEnchantmentLevel 20' on every world start. or you can automate it if running a server.**
